HEROINE_UPGRADES.name: Gold Rush
HEROINE_UPGRADES.description: Increase gold earned from daily orders

intro.text: Welcome to Heart Merge: Queen of Hearts! Tap generators (👛✏️) on the board to produce items, drag to merge them into higher-tier items, and complete orders to conquer the heartthrobs! Tip: Generators can be merged and upgraded too~

game_complete.title: Congratulations!
game_complete.subtitle: You've become the Queen of Hearts and conquered all the heartthrobs!

default_fail.player: (Sigh... I need to be faster next time...)
